name: ingestion-worker
description: Cron-triggered service that polls sources, normalizes, deduplicates, enriches, and persists events

scripts.docker:build:le-deps: docker build -f ../location-extraction-service/Dockerfile.deps -t living-map/le-deps:latest ../location-extraction-service && docker buildx prune -af
scripts.docker:build: npm run docker:build:mock-feed && npm run docker:build:le-deps && npm run docker:build:le
scripts.check: biome check --write src/ tests/ && node scripts/check-jsdoc.mjs
scripts.lint:ci: biome ci src/ tests/ && node scripts/check-jsdoc.mjs
